positive: A central, symmetrical, stylized illustration of interconnected cosmic flora and celestial geometry. Featuring glowing, stylized bioluminescent leaves, entwined crescent moons, and geometric constellations forming a cohesive mandala pattern. The palette should utilize deep indigo, ethereal teal, soft gold accents, and pops of luminous violet. Clean, thick-line art style mixed with vaporwave aesthetics, perfect for screen printing. High contrast, strong negative space, vector graphic quality, highly detailed etching style, suitable for a t-shirt print.
